title: bus.hearth.dispatch.requested v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's reactor when the Android app triggers a dispatch preset from the curated buttons list. The preset describes a project, command, and args; the actual dispatch is performed by a listener on the originating host (hearth-loom or tengine).

preset_id.description: Unique identifier of the dispatch preset (e.g. 'tengine.racing.200frames').

label.description: Human-readable label shown on the preset button (e.g. 'Run racing 200 frames').

args.description: Static argument list baked into the preset.

user_args.description: Optional per-invocation arguments supplied by the user at dispatch time.

requested_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the dispatch was requested.
